dict.string: Spiritual Gifts Survey does not access your calendar. This permission is only requested if required by a third-party library used by the application.
Spiritual Gifts Survey does not access your contacts. This permission is only requested if required by a third-party library used by the application.
Spiritual Gifts Survey does not record audio. This permission is only requested if required by a third-party library used by the application.
Spiritual Gifts Survey does not access your music library. This permission is only requested if required by a third-party library used by the application.
Spiritual Gifts Survey does not integrate with Siri. This permission is only requested if required by a third-party library used by the application.
Spiritual Gifts Survey does not use your location. This permission is only requested if required by a third-party library used by the application.
Spiritual Gifts Survey does not use your location. This permission is only requested if required by a third-party library used by the application.
Spiritual Gifts Survey does not use Bluetooth. This permission is only requested if required by a third-party library used by the application.
